arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen have only lost once, so why are they six points behind Bayern Munich?
arts.sum: Defending Bundesliga champions Bayer Leverkusen have only lost once in the league so far this season, so how come they're six points behind leaders Bayern Munich? First-half goals from Patrik Schick and Aleix García had put Leverkusen 2-0 up and on course for the points, but they were pegged back and failed to win – and not for the first time this season.

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel to leave Bayern Munich in January
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano reports that Matys Tel has opted to leave FC Bayern Munich before the current transfer window closes.

arts.ttl: Premier League clubs ready to rival Chelsea’s interest in Mathys Tel
arts.sum: The race for Mathys Tel (19) is heating up. Fabrizio Romano revealed earlier tonight that the Frenchman is keen to leave his current club Bayern Munich during the ongoing transfer…

arts.ttl: Kane scores first open-play goal since November to help Bayern win
arts.sum: Harry Kane helps Bayern Munich move six points clear at the top of Bundesliga table with a win 2-1 at Freiburg after scoring for the first time in open play since November.

arts.ttl: Chelsea target Mathys Tel wants to leave Bayern
arts.sum: According to a report from Fabrizio Romano, Mathys Tel (19) has decided to leave Bayern Munich during the ongoing transfer window. The Frenchman has had limited minutes this season under…

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel decides to leave Bayern
arts.sum: According to Sky Germany and Fabrizio Romano, Mathys Tel has now decided that he wants to leave Bayern Munich before the transfer window closes.

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel decides to LEAVE Bayern amid Chelsea interest
arts.sum: The 19-year-old has been an unused substitute on 14 occasions in all competitions since the beginning of the 2024-25 campaign, and Chelsea are now set to intensify their interest before the January transfer window closes. Mathys Tel has decided to leave Bayern Munich before Deadline Day amid serious interest from Chelsea, according to Fabrizio Romano.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Slovan Bratislava: Lineups, team news, injuries, how to watch & more!
arts.sum: With a win over Bratislava, Bayern will need seven of the following 10 results to go their way in order to secure a top eight finish in the Champions League table: Aston Villa draw/loss to Celtic (if Celtic wins, Bayern will need to hold five-goal differential)

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich still keeping eyes open on goalkeeper market after signing Jonas Urbig
arts.sum: Even after the signing of Jonas Urbig, Bayern are still keeping an eye on the goalkeeping market for 2026 in the event that none of the current alternatives (Urbig, Peretz, Nübel) develop as a worthy Neuer successor. Jonas Urbig has joined Bayern Munich from FC Köln on a long-term deal worth roughly 10-million euros that will keep him with the Rekordmeister through June of 2029.

arts.ttl: Max Eberl: Vincent Kompany “biggest” addition to Bayern Munich in 2024
arts.sum: “I think the biggest gain we have is Vincent Kompany,” Bayern executive board member for sport Max Eberl stated simply in recent comments captured by Bild, via @iMiaSanMia . Bayern Munich made a number of big signings in last summer’s transfer window —but none were as impactful as the selection of head coach Vincent Kompany.
